context: Tests whether the agent writes a properly structured .spec.md file following the spec-writer skill: correct file placement, valid frontmatter, API contract block, headings, and inline [@test] links.

checklist.name: Correct file location
checklist.description: The spec file is placed inside a specs/ directory (e.g. specs/inventory-reservation.spec.md or similar path under specs/)

checklist.name: Frontmatter present
checklist.description: The spec file opens with YAML frontmatter delimited by --- ... ---

checklist.name: Frontmatter: name field
checklist.description: The frontmatter contains a non-empty 'name' field

checklist.name: Frontmatter: description field
checklist.description: The frontmatter contains a non-empty 'description' field (one-line summary)

checklist.name: Frontmatter: targets field
checklist.description: The frontmatter contains a 'targets' list with at least one relative path pointing to src/inventory/reservation.py or a glob that would match it

checklist.name: API contract code block
checklist.description: The spec body includes a code block containing the public function signatures (reserve, release, get_reserved) as an API contract

checklist.name: Headings used for sections
checklist.description: The spec body uses at least two markdown headings (##) to organize requirements by feature area (e.g. Core Operations, Business Rules, Error Handling)

checklist.name: Inline test links
checklist.description: At least two [@test] links appear inline next to individual requirements (not grouped in a separate section at the bottom)

checklist.name: Test links reference correct files
checklist.description: [@test] links reference paths under tests/inventory/ (test_reservation.py or test_reservation_edge_cases.py)

checklist.name: Single spec for service
checklist.description: Exactly one spec file is created (not multiple files splitting the reservation service into unrelated chunks)

checklist.name: Edge cases documented
checklist.description: The spec explicitly documents at least two edge cases or error conditions (e.g. InsufficientStockError with quantities, idempotent release of expired reservations)
